zh.Church, Catwick, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾卡特維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Clervaux II於1370年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir John Clervaux22歲，母親Beatrix Maudeverer25歲。他於1394年與Isabel de Richmond在英國越可爾卡芙特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世在法國皮卡迪索姆。

zh-hans.Church, Catwick, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾卡特維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Clervaux II于1370年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir John Clervaux22岁，母亲Beatrix Maudeverer25岁。他于1394年与Isabel de Richmond在英国越可爾卡芙特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世在法国皮卡迪索姆。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Clervaux II was born in 1370, in England, his father, Sir John Clervaux, was 22 and his mother, Beatrix Maudeverer, was 25. He married Isabel de Richmond in 1394, in Croft, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died in Somme, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Clervaux II est né en 1370, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Clervaux, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Maudeverer, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Richmond en 1394, à Croft, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé à Somme, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Clervaux II 1370 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Clervaux 22 und seine Mutter Beatrix Maudeverer 25. Er hat 1394 in Croft, Yorkshire, England Isabel de Richmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Clervaux II è nato il nel 1370 nel England, il suo padre, Sir John Clervaux, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix Maudeverer, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Richmond nel 1394, nel Croft, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel Somme, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: John Clervaux IIが1370年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Clervauxは22歳，母Beatrix Maudevererは25歳であった。1394年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクロフトでIsabel de Richmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼はフランスピカーディソンメで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Clervaux II(이)가 1370년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Clervaux(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix Maudeverer(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1394년 영국 요르크실르 크로프트에서 Isabel de Richmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 사망했다.

mn.Church, Catwick, Yorkshire, England: Catwick, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Clervaux II nasceu em 1370, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Clervaux, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Maudeverer, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Richmond em 1394, em Croft, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em Somme, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Clervaux II родился в 1370 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Clervaux было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Maudeverer, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Richmond в 1394 г. в местности крофт, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Clervaux II nació en 1370, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Clervaux, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Beatrix Maudeverer, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Isabel de Richmond en 1394, en Croft, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en Somme, Picardie, Francia.
